EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriTopologyRuleType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Types of topology rules.

[Guid("57CF839D-CA40-43C6-B328-877A344C5AFF")]
public enum esriTopologyRuleType

Fields

esriInternalTRTParcel = 63

63: The rule is for internal use only. Its used for the parcel dataset.

esriTRTAny = -1

-1: The rule type can be any. Used when querying.

esriTRTAreaAreaCoverEachOther = 5

5: The rule is an 2 areas cover each other rule.

esriTRTAreaBoundaryCoveredByAreaBoundary = 38

38: The rule is an area boundary covered by line rule.

esriTRTAreaBoundaryCoveredByLine = 37

37: The rule is an area boundary covered by line rule.

esriTRTAreaContainOnePoint = 16

16: The rule is one point must be found in each area.

esriTRTAreaContainPoint = 43

43: The rule is an area contain point rule.

esriTRTAreaCoveredByArea = 7

7: The rule is an area covered by area rule.

esriTRTAreaCoveredByAreaClass = 4

4: The rule is an area covered by area class rule.

esriTRTAreaNoGaps = 1

1: The rule is an area-no gap rule.

esriTRTAreaNoOverlap = 3

3: The rule is an area-no overlap rule.

esriTRTAreaNoOverlapArea = 8

8: The rule is an area covered by area rule.

esriTRTFeatureLargerThanClusterTolerance = 0

0: The rule is a feature to be deleted is smaller than the cluster tolerance rule.

esriTRTLineCoveredByAreaBoundary = 10

10: The rule is a line covered by area boundary rule.

esriTRTLineCoveredByLineClass = 26

26: The rule is a line covered by line class rule.

esriTRTLineEndpointCoveredByPoint = 42

42: The rule is a line endpoint covered by point rule.

esriTRTLineInsideArea = 11

11: The rule is a line must be inside area rule.

esriTRTLineNoDangles = 21

21: The rule is a line-no dangles rule.

esriTRTLineNoIntersectLine = 45

45: The rule is a line must not intersect with line rule.

esriTRTLineNoIntersectOrInteriorTouch = 41

41: The rule is a line-no intersect or interior touch rule.

esriTRTLineNoIntersectOrInteriorTouchLine = 46

46: The rule is a line must not intersect or touch interior of line rule.

esriTRTLineNoIntersection = 20

20: The rule is a line-no intersection rule.

esriTRTLineNoMultipart = 44

44: The rule is a line cannot be multipart rule.

esriTRTLineNoOverlap = 19

19: The rule is a line-no overlap rule.

esriTRTLineNoOverlapLine = 28

28: The rule is a line-no overlap line rule.

esriTRTLineNoPseudos = 22

22: The rule is a line with no pseudo-nodes rule.

esriTRTLineNoSelfIntersect = 40

40: The rule is a line-no self intersect rule.

esriTRTLineNoSelfOverlap = 39

39: The rule is a line-no self overlap rule.

esriTRTPointCoincidePoint = 35

35: The rule is a point must be coincident with point rule.

esriTRTPointCoveredByAreaBoundary = 13

13: The rule is a point covered by area boundary rule.

esriTRTPointCoveredByLine = 29

29: The rule is a point covered by line rule.

esriTRTPointCoveredByLineEndpoint = 31

31: The rule is a point covered by line endpoint rule.

esriTRTPointDisjoint = 34

34: The rule is a point must be disjoint rule.

esriTRTPointProperlyInsideArea = 15

15: The rule is a point properly inside area rule.
